title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dalmia Bharat - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dalmia Bharat - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!
